description.en: Compress the data, returning a bytes object containing the compressed data. compresslevel and mtime have the same meaning as in the GzipFile constructor above, but mtime defaults to 0 for reproducible output. Added in version 3.2. Changed in version 3.8: Added the mtime parameter for reproducible output. Changed in version 3.11: Speed is improved by compressing all data at once instead of in a streamed fashion. Calls with mtime set to 0 are delegated to zlib.compress() for better speed. In th...
